summary: Iteration 91 - Verified ASX stock prices use correct .AX suffix and client navigation stays within app (no pop-out). All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend navigation verified: clicking client card in CRM navigates to /client-360 using React Router (SPA navigation, no window.open).

issues: Compliance modal (Important Information) appears on every page load - expected behavior for financial compliance

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GET /api/live/stock/CBA returns live ASX stock data with correct price, sector='Financials', data_source='live' or 'mock'
PASS: GET /api/live/stock/BHP returns live ASX stock data with correct price, sector='Materials', data_source='live' or 'mock'
PASS: live_data.py line 92 correctly adds .AX suffix: ticker_symbol = f"{symbol}.AX" if symbol in ASX_STOCKS else symbol
PASS: CRMCommandCenter.jsx line 345 uses navigate('/client-360') - React Router SPA navigation
PASS: ClientCRM.jsx line 90 uses navigate('/client-360') - React Router SPA navigation
PASS: AdviserHub.jsx line 129 uses navigate('/client-360') - React Router SPA navigation
PASS: Layout.jsx uses useNavigate hook for all navigation - no target='_blank' for client pages
PASS: No window.open() calls for client navigation - only used for calendar integrations and OAuth flows
PASS: Frontend test confirmed URL changes from /client-crm to /client-360 on client card click (SPA navigation, no pop-out)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 91 verified: 1) ASX stocks correctly use .AX suffix via yfinance (CBA.AX, BHP.AX) - implemented in live_data.py line 92. 2) Client navigation uses React Router navigate() function - no window.open() or target='_blank' for client pages. Navigation from CRM to Client 360 stays within the SPA. Compliance modal appears on every page load (expected financial compliance behavior).

asx_stock_suffix.implementation: live_data.py line 92: ticker_symbol = f"{symbol}.AX" if symbol in ASX_STOCKS else symbol

client_navigation.implementation: navigate('/client-360') using React Router useNavigate hook
client_navigation.no_popup: Verified - no window.open() or target='_blank' for client pages
client_navigation.spa_navigation: URL changes from /client-crm to /client-360 within same domain

layout_navigation.implementation: All navigation uses <Link> components and useNavigate hook
layout_navigation.no_target_blank_for_clients: target='_blank' only used for external links (DocuSign, Google Cloud, Azure, ATO references)

target_blank_usage: External documentation links only (DocuSign, Google Cloud Console, Azure Portal, ATO references)
No target='_blank' for internal client navigation
